creator: orion@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Could not reproduce problem and timing it out.  Believe it was due to 
PCI latency being set too small in BIOS on machine in question: other 
users have reported similar problem on different h/w when this was the 
case, though I could not reproduce this with any PCI latency setting 
at home...
